hero_title:
Where professionals build,
evolve and scale Design Systems.
hero_description: A space for product, design, and development professionals to exchange real experiences, face practical challenges, and evolve Design Systems that work at scale.
mission_description: DSBr emerged to be a space for product, design, and development professionals to exchange real experiences, solve practical challenges, evolve professionally, and network.
mission_bullet_1_description: We share real challenges, difficult decisions, and solutions that work in the context of product, business, and technology without romanticizing the process.
mission_bullet_2_description: We bring design, product, and development closer to build together, with open dialogue, technical respect, and shared responsibility.
mission_bullet_3_description: We create a welcoming space for questions and discussions at different maturity levels, because learning is part of any professional journey.
event_1_description: An informal meeting to open the community, present DSBr, align expectations, and create connections. No lectures, no technical content, just conversation, and lots of networking.
event_2_description: A practical conversation about how Design Systems appear in the daily lives of those who work with product and design. What to expect, how to start, where doubts normally arise, and what are the most common mistakes along the way.
event_3_title: Design Tokens are Not a Tool
event_3_description: Before Figma Variables, before JSON, before code. A conversation about conceptual decisions, responsibilities, and team agreements that need to exist before any token implementation.
library_description: Explore Design Systems used in real products to study decisions, understand patterns, and expand your repertoire together with the community.
library_card_1_description: The global open-source framework defined by unified adoption in the Android and web system.
library_card_2_description: The main and most respected open-source ecosystem focused entirely on e-commerce.
library_card_3_description: The classic modular governance system that guides all IBM Cloud hardware and software.
content_event_description: A light meeting to get to know each other, exchange ideas, and strengthen the community. Open to product, development, and related professionals.
join_title: Come be part of the community
join_description: A space for people interested in product design and development to exchange experiences, ask questions, and evolve together. Join the community on Discord and follow our content through the weekly newsletter on Substack.
footer_description: A space for product, design, and development professionals to exchange real experiences, solve practical challenges, and evolve Design Systems that work at scale.
job_details_about_desc: We are looking for a Senior Design System Engineer to join the Base team (Uber's Global Design System). Your role will be critical for structuring the integration between native web and mobile components, acting very close to Design and Engineering leadership in San Francisco and São Paulo.
job_details_what_item_1: Lead the technical strategy for cross-platform components and token distribution via Code.
job_details_what_item_2: Maintain our React/React Native component library documented end-to-end with high structural rigor.
job_details_what_item_3: Actively collaborate on accessibility decisions (WCAG 2.1 AA) for drivers and users in low connectivity environments.
job_details_requirements_item_1: At least 5 years of solid experience with TypeScript and advanced front-end ecosystem.
job_details_requirements_item_2: Previous, clear, and objective experience in maintaining Design Systems operating in scalable production.
job_details_requirements_item_3: Fluent or advanced English (100% global team communication and documentation).
job_details_benefits_item_2: Full home-office allowance and premium equipment setup.
job_details_nice_to_have_item_1: Experience with native development (iOS/Swift or Android/Kotlin).
job_details_nice_to_have_item_2: Previous contributions to famous Open-Source Design System repositories.
job_details_posted_date: Posted by the Community 2 days ago
job_similar_desc: See other open opportunities in the Design Systems community that might match your profile.
plugin_description: Analyze your Design System, identify accessibility flaws, inconsistencies and export tokens in Tokens Studio format (JSON) with just one click.
banner_text: Support the dsbr.design community and help us grow! ☕️
